creator: dindin@dindin.ru
text:

> State-Changed-Why: 
> hi,
> 
> File is not fetchable.
> fetch: http://www.dindin.ru/download/fortune-bashorgru-20070723.tar.gz: Not Found.
> 
> Could you fix this? 
> 
> 
> 
> 
> 
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->miwi
> Responsible-Changed-By: miwi
> Responsible-Changed-When: Tue Jul 24 12:49:42 UTC 2007
> Responsible-Changed-Why: 
> take
>

I think it's temporary problem caused by changing of A-record in dns. Try to
refresh www.dindin.ru A-record in your DNS-cache.

Cheers,
Denis Barov
